texto: 1 Product List: (GET /credit-fixed-incomes/v1/investments) 2 Product Identification: (GET /credit-fixed-incomes/v1/investments/{investmentId}) 3 Balances: (GET /credit-fixed-incomes/v1/investments/{investmentId}/balances) 4 Transactions: (GET /credit-fixed-incomes/v1/investments/{investmentId}/transactions) 5 Transactions Current: (GET /credit-fixed-incomes/v1/investments/{investmentId}/transactions-current) Product List: (GET /credit-fixed-incomes/v1/investments) Visão Geral Obtém a lista de operações de Renda Fixa Crédito mantidas pelo cliente na instituição transmissora e para as quais ele tenha fornecido consentimento. title: Informações Gerais - [DC] Renda Fixa Crédito - v1.0.3 - Área do Desenvolvedor - Open Finance Brasil - Área do Desenvolvedor
